languages.text: "Возможно, песни о подвигах вашего полка преувеличены, Ведка".
"Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."
languages.original_text: "Возможно, песни о подвигах вашего полка преувеличены, Ведка".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's exploits are exaggerated, Vedka."
"Perhaps the songs of your regiment's exploits are exaggerated, Vedka."
"Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."
"Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

languages.text: "Vielleicht sind die Lieder über die Taten Eures Regiments übertrieben, Vedka."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht sind die Lieder über die Taten Eures Regiments übertrieben, Vedka."

languages.text: « Les exploits que chante votre régiment sont peut-être un peu exagérés, Vedka. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: « Les exploits que chante votre régiment sont peut-être un peu exagérés, Vedka. »

languages.text: «Tal vez las canciones sobre las hazañas del regimiento estén exagerando, Vedka».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez las canciones sobre las hazañas del regimiento estén exagerando, Vedka».

languages.text: "Belki de alayının kahramanlık şarkıları abartılıdır Vedka."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de alayının kahramanlık şarkıları abartılıdır Vedka."

languages.text: “薇德卡，传唱你们军团功绩的那些歌谣，也许有些言过其实了。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: “薇德卡，传唱你们军团功绩的那些歌谣，也许有些言过其实了。”

languages.text: 「もしかしたら、貴方の連隊の功績を歌った歌は誇張されているのかもしれませんね、ヴェドカ。」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the songs of your regiment's deeds are exaggerated, Vedka."

traits.locale_text: 「もしかしたら、貴方の連隊の功績を歌った歌は誇張されているのかもしれませんね、ヴェドカ。」
